creator: gravity6@gmx.de
text:
The Notebook is a Clevo P750ZM (rebranded as XMG U505) with BIOS 1.05.01a configured to boot UEFI. Booting and installing is possible, Nvidia GTX970m is supported. But the first screen output is when the kernel starts. While the loader is active, there is just a black screen

 kernel: VT(efifb): resolution 1280x1024

I tried settings in loader.conf, but without success:

 boot_multicons="YES"
 console="efi,vidconsole,comconsole"
